description: Error Handling Integrity: Detect swallowed exceptions and lost error context.

fixtures.notes: Catch block contains only 'pass', silently swallowing an IOError with no logging or re-raise.
Catches Exception and raises a new RuntimeError without chaining, destroying the original traceback.
Catch block logs the full traceback with logger.exception() and then re-raises the original error.
Specific ValueError caught, handled gracefully with a user-friendly message and logged at WARNING level.
Error is logged but only at DEBUG level on a critical payment processing path where ERROR is required.
